title: Create Client Registration Page with UI-Only Form

requirements.summary: Create new route /client-register and corresponding page component ClientRegister.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: Route /client-register is registered in App.tsx router configuration
ClientRegister.tsx component file exists at frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx
Page is accessible via navigation to /client-register

file_operations.description: Add new route configuration for /client-register that renders the ClientRegister page component. Follow the existing TanStack Router pattern used for routes like /internal-portal and /partner-portal, ensuring the route is wrapped in the same layout with Header and Footer components.

Create new ClientRegister page component that will serve as the container for the client registration form. Initialize with basic React component structure returning a div wrapper, ready to receive form UI elements in subsequent requirements.

requirements.summary: Update Header navigation to route 'Daftar' link to /client-register
acceptanceCriteria: Daftar link in Header.tsx navigates to /client-register
Navigation works correctly on both desktop and mobile views
Link maintains existing styling and behavior

file_operations.description: Update the 'Daftar' navigation link to route to /client-register instead of its current target. Maintain existing Link component structure and styling for both desktop and mobile menu versions. Ensure the link remains accessible in the mobile hamburger menu.

requirements.summary: Implement centered card layout with white background, shadow, rounded corners, and 600-700px max-width
acceptanceCriteria: Card is horizontally centered on the page
Card has white background with soft drop shadow
Card has rounded corners matching site design system
Card max-width is between 600-700px
Card has comfortable internal padding

file_operations.description: Add centered card container with flex centering wrapper. Apply white background (bg-white), soft shadow (shadow-md or shadow-lg), rounded corners using Tailwind border-radius tokens from tailwind.config.js, max-width of 650px (between 600-700px), and comfortable padding (p-6 or p-8). Ensure the outer wrapper uses min-h-screen to center the card vertically.

requirements.summary: Add card title 'Form Pendaftaran Client' at top of card
acceptanceCriteria: Title displays exactly as 'Form Pendaftaran Client'
Title uses appropriate heading typography
Title is positioned at the top of the card

file_operations.description: Add h2 or h3 heading element at the top of the card with exact text 'Form Pendaftaran Client'. Use appropriate text size (text-2xl or text-3xl) and font weight (font-bold or font-semibold) consistent with other portal pages. Add bottom margin (mb-6) to separate from form fields below.

requirements.summary: Create four form input fields (Nama, Email, WhatsApp, Company) with disabled state, soft borders, padding, and placeholders
acceptanceCriteria: Four input fields are rendered: Nama, Email, WhatsApp, Company
All inputs have disabled attribute set to true by default
All inputs have soft borders and comfortable padding
All inputs display appropriate placeholder text
Company field is visually indicated as optional

file_operations.description: Add four labeled input fields: Nama (required), Email (required), WhatsApp (required), and Company (optional). Use label elements with appropriate spacing. Apply disabled attribute to all inputs by default, soft border styling (border border-gray-300), comfortable padding (px-4 py-2 or p-3), and appropriate placeholder text for each field. Add '(opsional)' indicator to Company label. Stack fields vertically with consistent spacing (space-y-4 or mb-4 between fields).

requirements.summary: Add Submit button with primary black styling, pill-radius, and disabled state with 50% opacity
acceptanceCriteria: Submit button is rendered below form fields
Button text is exactly 'Submit'
Button has primary black background color
Button has pill-radius (fully rounded corners)
Button is disabled by default
Disabled state shows 50% opacity

file_operations.description: Add Submit button below form fields with exact text 'Submit'. Apply primary black background (bg-black), white text (text-white), pill-radius (rounded-full), appropriate padding (px-6 py-3), disabled attribute set to true by default, and 50% opacity when disabled (disabled:opacity-50). Add top margin (mt-6) to separate from form fields.

requirements.summary: Add Login Internet Identity button below Submit button with secondary styling and full width
acceptanceCriteria: Login II button is positioned below Submit button with appropriate spacing
Button text is exactly 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'
Button has secondary styling (not primary black)
Button spans full width of the card
Button is enabled by default (not disabled)

file_operations.description: Add Login Internet Identity button below Submit button with exact text 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'. Apply secondary styling using border with primary color (border border-black or border-primary), transparent or white background, black text, full width (w-full), appropriate padding (px-6 py-3), and rounded corners. Add top margin (mt-4) to separate from Submit button. Button should be enabled by default (no disabled attribute).

requirements.summary: Implement dummy UI state toggle that enables/disables inputs and Submit button when Login II is clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Local React state tracks login status (default: false)
Clicking Login II button toggles login status
When logged in, all input fields become enabled
When logged in, Submit button becomes enabled
When logged out, all inputs and Submit button are disabled
No API calls or authentication logic is executed
No backend integration or real authentication

file_operations.description: Add React useState hook to track dummy login state (default: false). Wire Login II button onClick handler to toggle this state. Bind the disabled attribute of all four input fields and the Submit button to the inverse of the login state (disabled={!isLoggedIn}). Do not implement any authentication logic, API calls, or backend integration—this is purely UI state management for demonstration purposes.

requirements.summary: Apply responsive mobile-first layout ensuring card centering, comfortable padding, and adaptive width across screen sizes
acceptanceCriteria: Layout works correctly on mobile screens (320px+)
Card maintains comfortable padding on all screen sizes
Card is horizontally centered on desktop and tablet
All form elements stack vertically with appropriate spacing
No horizontal scrolling on mobile devices
Touch targets meet minimum size requirements on mobile

file_operations.description: Apply mobile-first responsive design using Tailwind responsive utilities. Use padding utilities (px-4 sm:px-6) on outer wrapper to prevent edge-to-edge layout on mobile. Ensure card container uses responsive width (w-full with max-w-2xl or max-w-[650px]) and horizontal centering (mx-auto). Verify all form elements stack vertically with consistent spacing. Ensure button touch targets are appropriately sized (min-h-[44px] or py-3) for mobile interaction.

requirements.summary: Ensure all text content matches specification exactly without modifications
acceptanceCriteria: Card title is exactly 'Form Pendaftaran Client'
Input labels match exactly: 'Nama', 'Email', 'WhatsApp', 'Company'
Submit button text is exactly 'Submit'
Login II button text is exactly 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'
No text modifications or translations

file_operations.description: Verify and finalize all text content to match specification exactly: card title 'Form Pendaftaran Client', input labels 'Nama', 'Email', 'WhatsApp', 'Company' (with Company marked as opsional), Submit button 'Submit', and Login II button 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'. Review the component to ensure no text has been modified or translated from the specified values.
